articles.title: ICE at Airports Trains Us to Accept Being Terrorized in Our Daily Lives
articles.description:
I had an ultimately harmless encounter with ICE at a TSA checkpoint. It was a preview of a new, more sophisticated way to terrorize people.

articles.author: Greg's diary
articles.title: More named failures

While attending to the power failure, discovered that almost no mail had come in overnight.
That's a sure sign of either a full file system on mail.lemis.com, or
that named has crashed. This time it was the latter. And a couple of hours later it
crashed again…
